_comment: 60K benchmark gate: 197M control vs KD with Qwen3-0.6B (ratio 1:3). Codex Tier 2 approved. Alpha schedule: cooler inverted-U (max 0.45) with 0.05 tail through WSD. Tau 1.2->2.2. Hard eval gates at 3K/6K/15K/30K/60K.
_codex_approval: Tier 2 Review 2026-03-27. Scaling Expert + Architecture Theorist + Competitive Analyst panel.
name: kd_197m_60k_gate

variants._alpha_schedule_explained: 0->0.45 over 0-2K (warmup), hold 0.45 from 2K-40K, decay 0.45->0.05 from 40K-48K, hold 0.05 tail through WSD 48K-60K
variants._tau_schedule_explained: 1.2->2.2 over 0-20K, then hold 2.2. Lower start than 90M (was 1.5) since 1:3 ratio doesn't need aggressive softening
variants._rationale: Codex Tier 2: alpha_max=0.45 (cooler than 90M 0.60), 0.05 WSD tail (don't zero), tau capped at 2.2 (was 3.0). Ratio 1:3 near-optimal per Law of Capacity Gap.
